description: Command payload sent on the bind:update-body bus channel to modify annotation bodies.

annotationId.description: Branded AnnotationId of the annotation whose body is being updated

resourceId.description: Branded ResourceId of the resource the annotation belongs to

userId.description: Branded UserId of the user performing the update

oldItem.description: Previous body item for replace operations

newItem.description: Replacement body item for replace operations

operations.description: List of body mutation operations to apply
